{"id":"smallhold-i28n","title":"Full-text post search via tantivy","description":"## What
Integrate tantivy as an in-process full-text search engine for posts, wire it into GET /api/v2/search?type=statuses, and provide a CLI reindex command.

## Why
Users need to find their own posts and public posts by keyword without loading the full timeline; tantivy is a pure-Rust, embeddable search library that fits the single-binary constraint.

## Scope
- tantivy index schema and lifecycle (startup, background reindex)
- Index maintenance on post create/edit/delete
- Wire into /api/v2/search?type=statuses
- CLI reindex subcommand
- Config: search_index_path
- Visibility filtering: only own posts and public posts","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T04:20:04Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T04:20:04Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-buds","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:21:20Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-mic6","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:21:21Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-quu3","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:21:20Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-xlqc","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:21:19Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
